allow: Bash(python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('data.xlsx'\); print\('Sheets:', wb.sheetnames\); ws = wb[wb.sheetnames[0]]; print\('Rows:', ws.max_row, 'Cols:', ws.max_column\); print\('First 3 rows:'\); [print\([cell.value for cell in row]\) for row in list\(ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=3\)\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import pandas; df = pandas.read_excel\('data.xlsx'\); print\(df.head\(3\)\); print\(df.describe\(\)\)")
